title: Tracker de Divulgación UAP — Publicación inicial
summary: Lanzamiento del Tracker de Divulgación UAP cubriendo 79 años de historia UAP/OVNI desde el incidente de Roswell de 1947 hasta la orden ejecutiva de divulgación de Trump en 2026. El tracker documenta audiencias del Congreso, testimonios de denunciantes, investigaciones de AARO y el proceso institucional en curso de divulgación UAP. 6 KPIs, 5 afirmaciones en disputa, 10 figuras políticas clave y una línea de tiempo integral que abarca 5 eras.

title: UAP Disclosure Tracker Update — Sun Apr 5, 2026
summary: As the 90-day deadline from Trump's February 19 UAP disclosure executive order approaches (May 20, 2026), multiple developments are unfolding.

title: UAP Disclosure Tracker Update — Thu Feb 19, 2026
summary: President Trump signs an executive order directing the Department of Defense to begin the process of releasing classified UAP and alien-related files to the public.

title: UAP Disclosure Tracker Update — Sat Nov 1, 2025
summary: The Sol Foundation holds its second annual symposium, building on the momentum of its inaugural 2023 Stanford event.

title: UAP Disclosure Tracker Update — Sat Mar 15, 2025
summary: AARO's Historical Record Report Volume 2, which was expected to cover post-2023 whistleblower claims and congressional referrals in greater depth, remains unreleased as of March 2025.

title: UAP Disclosure Tracker Update — Thu Dec 19, 2024
summary: The Schumer-Rounds UAP Disclosure Act is effectively gutted during House-Senate conference on the FY2025 NDAA.

title: UAP Disclosure Tracker Update — Sun Dec 1, 2024
summary: Unknown drones penetrate restricted airspace over Langley Air Force Base, Virginia, for 17 consecutive nights beginning in December 2024.

title: UAP Disclosure Tracker Update — Wed Nov 13, 2024
summary: The Senate Armed Services Committee holds a hearing focused on UAP investigations and AARO's progress.

title: UAP Disclosure Tracker Update — Wed Jul 26, 2023
summary: David Grusch Testifies Under Oath on UAP Retrieval Programs.

title: UAP Disclosure Tracker Update — Mon Jun 12, 2023
UAP Disclosure Tracker Update — Sat Dec 16, 2017
summary: New York Times Reveals Secret Pentagon UFO Program (AATIP).

title: UAP Disclosure Tracker Update — Sun Nov 14, 2004
summary: USS Nimitz Carrier Group Encounters 'Tic Tac' Object Off San Diego.

title: UAP Disclosure Tracker Update — Tue Jul 8, 1947
summary: Roswell Army Air Field public information officer Walter Haut issues press release stating the 509th Bomb Group has recovered a 'flying disc' from a ranch near Roswell, New Mexico.
